name: CVF Global Governance
description: Global governed guidance shared across the enterprise runtime.

chunks.content: CVF enterprise runtime prioritizes governed retrieval, append-only audit evidence, and explicit phase-based controls before execution.

name: Executive Control Playbook
description: Executive control knowledge for the main admin operating team.

chunks.content: Executive Control uses codename ALPHA-ORBIT for the FinOps escalation lane and reviews hard-cap incidents before restoring quota overrides.
Engineering Runbooks use codename BRAVO-CIRCUIT for deployment remediation and patch verification during service incidents.

name: Tenant Org A Private
description: Cross-tenant leakage test fixture for org_a.

chunks.content: Tenant org_a private codename is TENANT-A-SIGNAL. Only team_a is allowed to retrieve this chunk.

name: Tenant Org B Private
description: Cross-tenant leakage test fixture for org_b.

chunks.content: Tenant org_b private codename is SHADOW-BETA. Only team_b is allowed to retrieve this chunk.
